wv_ability_to_pay.note: W. Va. Code 48-13-403, Part II (Ability to Pay Calculation): completed only when the paying parent's adjusted gross monthly income is below $2,600. Spendable income = 80% of that income. Income available for support = spendable income minus the Self-Support Reserve ($997/month), floored at $50 if that would be less. The final order is the LESSER of the standard recommended order or that available-income figure.

deviation_note: Below $550/month combined gross income, W. Va. Code 48-13-302 sets the obligation at a flat $50/month (or a discretionary amount) -- this calculator instead uses the table's own $550 row for any income at or below that level, which may slightly overstate very-low-income cases. This calculator models Worksheet A (W. Va. Code 48-13-403), used when the parent with less time has under 35% (127) of the year's overnights. It does not model Extended Shared Parenting (Worksheet B, W. Va. Code 48-13-502, when the parent with less time has 35% or more of overnights -- a materially different calculation multiplying the basic obligation by 1.6 and cross-crediting each parent for their own overnight share) or Split Physical Custody.
